examples: This paper describes graft copolymerization of acrylic acid onto superfine cellulose using potassium persulphate as initiator.
A persulphate oxidation method in acid medium for decomposition and analysis of dissolved total phosphorus in seawater was proposed.
Under basic condition, phenol has strong sensitivity quenching ability to electrogenerated chemiluminescence produced by fluorescein-potassium persulphate system.
